events.title: Loop'd In
events.description: Virtual networking for Chicago business owners who want to stay informed, connected, and moving forward. Structured intros, breakout connections, weekly business insights, and Quick Wins sharing. BYOC (Bring Your Own Coffee) - we'll bring the connections.
